title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
summary: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.

title: The climate tech IPO window could finally be cracking open
summary: Nuclear startup X-energy went public, geothermal startup Fervo is about to. Could this be the moment that climate tech investors have been waiting for?

title: India’s Snabbit seeks fresh funding at a $400M valuation, sources say
summary: Snabbit has scaled rapidly, crossing one million jobs in March, amid growing investor interest.

title: XRP may rise 30% as traders withdraw 35M tokens from exchanges in a day
summary: Recent XRP outflow spikes have often come before short-term price rallies, signaling a potential move higher in May if the pattern repeats.

title: Lachy Groom to back India startup Pronto at a $200M valuation, sources say
summary: This round, should it occur, would double the house-help startup's valuation in a matter of weeks.

title: Aurelion allocates $48M in tokenized gold to newly launched yield protocol
summary: The XAUE protocol lets holders earn yield on tokenized gold through lending and trading strategies while maintaining exposure to the underlying asset.

title: Trump DOJ Backs Elon Musk's xAI in Fight Over Colorado AI Bias Law
summary: The Justice Department moved to intervene in xAI’s lawsuit challenging Colorado’s algorithmic discrimination law.

title: X-energy stock pops 27% on first day of trading following upsized IPO
summary: Investors flocked to nuclear power startup X-energy in its first day of public trading on the Nasdaq.

title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
summary: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.

title: Anthropic Rolls Out Election Safeguards for Claude AI Ahead of US Midterms
summary: Claude maker Anthropic reported that its latest AI models scored 95-96% on political neutrality tests ahead of the 2026 midterms.

title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
summary: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.

title: DeepSeek V4 Is Here—Its Pro Version Costs 98% Less Than GPT 5.5 Pro
summary: The Chinese lab that shook Wall Street just dropped its biggest, most efficient model yet, hours after OpenAI launched GPT-5.5.

title: Nuclear startup X-energy raises $1B in data center-driven IPO
summary: Amazon-backed X-energy was able to raise around 20% more money in its IPO as demand for nuclear power surges.

title: Anthropic Beats OpenAI on Secondary Markets With $1 Trillion Implied Valuation
summary: On Forge Global, Anthropic shares are hovering around $1 trillion while OpenAI trades at $880 billion — a reversal nobody saw coming three months ago.
